prompt: A portable floor air conditioner with a tall rectangular body on four caster wheels, a top exhaust grille, and a front outlet with one horizontal louver and several vertical vanes. prompt: A window air conditioner with a wide rectangular chassis, side accordion panels, a front discharge grille, and two rotary control dials on the right face.
